final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: character-illustration
Asset type: game splash art / character splash, vertical portrait
Primary request: mysterious oriental ancient-style female character playing guqin in bamboo forest under moonlight, ethereal and immortal aura
Scene/backdrop: dense bamboo forest at night, moonlight filtering through bamboo leaves creating dappled shadows on ground
Subject: Hanfu-clad young woman with flowing wide sleeves, elegant posture seated playing guqin, long flowing hair and ribbons, serene expression
Style/medium: Chinese ink wash painting meets modern game illustration, ethereal fantasy art
Composition/framing: medium shot with environmental context, vertical format, subject slightly off-center with bamboo framing
Lighting/mood: soft moonlight with dramatic leaf-cast shadows, mystical and serene atmosphere
Color palette: deep jade greens, moonlight silver-white, ink black, muted gold accents on Hanfu
Materials/textures: flowing silk Hanfu with subtle embroidery, glossy bamboo stalks, polished wooden guqin
Constraints: maintain traditional Hanfu silhouette with wide sleeves, ensure guqin is correctly depicted, keep ethereal floating ribbon elements
Avoid: modern clothing elements, anime-style oversized eyes, cluttered background, bright artificial colors, western fantasy armor
